name: Hyderabadi Biryani
recipeIngredient: 1.5 - 2 lbs lamb, bone in (use some pieces from the ribs)
make sure it is tender meat
2 medium onions, fried till golden brown
half a handful of cilantro leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the lamb, onions, ginger powder, garlic powder, green chilies, cinnamon, cardamom pods, cloves, cilantro leaves, red chili powder, yogurt, and salt in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Let the mixture marinate for about 4 hours (in the fridge).
3. Boil the basmati rice in twice as much water, till it is halfway cooked. Drain the excess water.
4. Place the marinated meat at the bottom of a baking pan or an aluminum baking dish.
5. Spread the cooked rice evenly over the meat mixture.
6. Heat saffron in half a cup of milk until fragrant and spread around the top layer of rice.
7. Cover the pan with its lid or aluminum foil.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 400°F (200°C) for about 45-60 minutes, checking at the 45-minute mark for desired doneness.
9. Serve hot with dahi ki chatni!
